videos.title: Lake Placid Loppet March 1, 2015 by John Eldridge
Lake Placid the final stop for international Nordic Skiing competition tour this weekend
videos.description:
Lake Placid’s Mount Van Hoevenberg is the host site for the last competition in the SWIX SuperTour Finals, an international Nordic skiing competition series.
